name: Oak Harbor Park
description: Oak Harbor Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Oak Harbor, WA. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. The courts cannot be reserved.

name: Rotary Park at North Whidbey Middle School
description: Rotary Park at North Whidbey Middle School is a place to play pickleball in Oak Harbor, WA. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: South Whidbey Community Center
description: South Whidbey Community Center is a place to play pickleball in Langley, WA. There are 2 indoor acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are private. Amenities include restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.

name: South Whidbey Community Center - South Whidbey Parks & Recreation
description:
See drop-in schedule at www.swparks.org/pickleball

Maximum 18 players per session.

$5 drop-in fee - Cash only, exact change, no coins
or
$35 monthly fee - Online registration only

name: South Whidbey Parks & Rec Outdoor Courts
description: All six asphalt courts are lined and playable now but the final court surfacing will be applied in the Spring 2026.

name: The Roller Barn
description: The Roller Barn is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Oak Harbor, WA. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include lights, restrooms, water, wheelchair accessibility, and food. The courts can be reserved. A one-time fee is required to play.
fees: Fee required — $10 per player 1 hour @ $21.80 (2 player minimum)

name: Whidbey Pickle Barn
description:
Make Friends | Get Fit | Have Fun | Play indoor pickleball—on Whidbey!
Have you fallen in love with the sport that's taking the world by storm?  Are you bored, lonely, out of shape, or tired of packing away your paddle + court shoes 6 months/year?  Want to play indoor pickleball on Whidbey Island but you're unsure where or how to start?  Well, you've come to the right place. Welcome to Whidbey Pickle Barn!
Follow us @ instagram.com/whidbeypicklebarn
open_play_schedule: All play must be booked in advance via our website.  Players can not show up to the facility without a confirmed reservation.
